secureAccount.title: Secure account creation
secureAccount.desc: StudentHub provides secure account creation of both student and landlord by strong and secured verification process.

rentalPrivacy.title: Rental Privacy Policy
rentalPrivacy.desc: Following governmental regulation on renting as a privacy policy in website protects students and make their payments secured.

directCommunication.title: Direct Communication
directCommunication.desc: Students can communicate directly with landlords to ask questions and get clear answers before booking.

fastBooking.title: Fast Booking Process
fastBooking.desc: Book accommodations quickly and easily from anywhere around the world with a smooth process.
